name: What happens first after I hurt my arm at work in Sandy Utah?

mainEntity.name: What happens first after I hurt my arm at work in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report in writing to employer ASAP, get medical care, notify doctor it's work-related.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report the injury to your employer immediately in writing, then seek medical care and tell the doctor it's work-related.[1][2][3] This starts your Utah workers' comp claim process.[3] Key factors: prompt reporting preserves eligibility; medical records prove work connection; employer sends claim to insurer.[3] Keep records of everything, follow doctor orders, avoid work until cleared to prevent claim harm.[2] Early attorney consult ensures proper filing.[3]

description: Report in writing to employer ASAP, get medical care, notify doctor it's work-related.[2][3]
